summary: Completed testing of Manual Credential Bridge with 2FA handling for CSDROP Portal (Iteration 15). All 14 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. Key features verified: Manual Login tab in SyncSessionModal, email/password form, password visibility toggle, security note, form validation, Start Login button, Cancel button during sync, tab switching blocked during sync, QR Code tab regression.
passed_tests: GET /api/csdrop/sync-status returns status, needs_2fa, qr_available, logs, session_exists fields
POST /api/csdrop/manual-login validates required fields (422 for missing email/password)
POST /api/csdrop/submit-2fa returns error when no process running
POST /api/csdrop/sync-stop returns error when no process running
POST /api/csdrop/sync-session endpoint still works (QR sync regression)
Frontend: Sync Session modal opens from Sovereign Bot tab
Frontend: QR Code tab visible and displays correctly
Frontend: Manual Login tab visible and displays correctly
Frontend: Security note visible ('Credentials are used once and never stored')
Frontend: Start Login button (data-testid=cs-start-sync-btn) visible with correct text
Frontend: Form validation shows toast for empty fields
Frontend: Cancel button (data-testid=cs-cancel-sync-btn) appears during syncing
Frontend: Tab switching blocked during sync
Frontend: Tab switching works when idle
seed_data_creation: None required - using existing CSDROP user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Manual Credential Bridge feature fully tested. Key components: 1) SyncSessionModal.jsx extracted from CsdropDashboard.jsx with QR Code and Manual Login tabs, 2) POST /api/csdrop/manual-login spawns sovereign.py with --manual flag, 3) POST /api/csdrop/submit-2fa writes code to 2fa_signal.txt for bot to read, 4) GET /api/csdrop/sync-status returns needs_2fa:true and status:'2fa_required' when bot logs contain '2FA_REQUIRED', 5) Polling at 2s intervals (POLL_INTERVAL = 2000), 6) Tab switching blocked during sync (switchMode checks syncing state), 7) 2FA input only accepts numeric digits (onChange filters non-digits). Note: sovereign.py will fail without real Discord credentials - that's expected behavior.

security_note.text: Credentials are used once and never stored
